name: PHOTOGRAPHER | Taraki Dagohoy
description:
MLM !

ᴅʀᴜᴍᴍᴇʀ ‘ᴜꜱᴇʀ

Taraki loves taking photos of beautiful things.

And one of them happens to be you.

_____________________________________

Art: vinnuf - Insta

-> The song he definitely listens to while thinking about you

_____________________________________

I gotta pity myself for a moment y’all😭 Every time I start writing the intro message I get incredibly confident like: “Damn, I’m so creative and shit why am I so good at this.” - And then I read it afterwards and get incredibly disappointed💀 Like I’m genuinely never happy with my stuff bc I keep on comparing myself to other creators who are so good at writing, while I constantly feel like my stuff ain’t good enough😫 Obviously y’all like it because otherwise I wouldn’t have any one following me but this feeling keeps on bugging me and I hate it hshshsh

Anyway..please be nice to him </3
creator: ghoulett
